_manifest_meta.description: Master index of all MTM equipment registry files. Update this manifest when a registry file is promoted, locked, or replaced.
_manifest_meta.update_notes: v2.0 (2026-03-29): Full rescan of /registry directory. 9 new registries added (ctl, skid_steer, wheel_loader, excavator, telehandler, backhoe_loader, dozer, scissor_lift, boom_lift). mini_excavator promoted to v2. All 4 original pending_registries promoted to active. pending_registries section cleared.

registries.registry_hash_note: Hash inherited from v1_final baseline — not yet recomputed for v2 migration additions.
registries.phase: Phase 2 — migration complete, unlocked for expansion
registries.notes: v2 migration added 15 records to the locked v1_final baseline (48 records). Total 63 records. Status MIGRATION_COMPLETE_UNLOCKED means open for further expansion without explicit unlock.

history.note: Field-order normalized. Was Phase 1 source of truth. Superseded by v2_migration.

registries.notes: 203 total records: ~71 production, ~6 production_candidate, ~122 coverage_stub (see registry meta). Includes Gehl and Toro from Batch 7 expansion. Takeuchi CTL Batch 2 OEM upgrade completed 2026-03-29. Post-dedup: 3 CTL slug duplicates removed. 1 cross-registry conflict fixed (JD 323G confirmed SSL).
253 total records. validation_status: PASS_CLEAN as of 2026-03-25. Was listed as 'in_progress' in original manifest pending_registries; now promoted to active registry.

25 records. 8 FAMILY/SERIES records (manual_review, no auto-fill). 17 EXACT model records. Top 25 by MachineryTrader frequency = 78.1% marketplace coverage. v1.0.3 final lock 2026-03-19. Was 'not_started' in original manifest pending_registries; now promoted.

File is named v2 but internal registry_id is 'mtm_excavator_registry_v1' — naming discrepancy noted. 14 records: full-size crawler excavators >= 18 metric tons + 1 scope exception (cat_308_cr, 8-tonne midi). Record count_verified=13 at Phase 1A lock; patch1 added cat_308_cr (14 total). patch2 (2026-03-25) locked cat_308_cr OEM specs. Was 'not_started' in original manifest pending_registries; now promoted.

File uses 'new_records' array key (not 'records') and _registry_meta at end of file — non-standard structure vs other registries. record_count: 17 per _registry_meta. Last promotions: skytrak_10054 and skytrak_8042 promoted 2026-03-24; genie_gth_844 OEM-locked and promoted 2026-03-25. Was 'not_started' in original manifest pending_registries; now promoted.

8 records: Case 580N, JD 310SL, Cat 420F2, Cat 430F2, Case 590SN, JD 410L, JCB 3CX, Kubota M62. Top-volume North American used-market models. Not present in original manifest — newly discovered in scan.

6 records: Cat D3, Cat D4, Cat D5, Cat D6T, JD 650K, JD 700K S-II. Top-volume North American used-market crawler dozers. Blade specs vary by configuration — MEDIUM confidence unless OEM-confirmed. Not present in original manifest — newly discovered in scan.

9 records: Genie GS-1930, GS-2632, GS-3232 (series rep), GRT3246 (RT rep); JLG 1930ES, 2630ES (series rep), 3246R (RT rep); Skyjack SJIII 3219, SJIII 3226 (series rep). Covers electric slab and diesel rough-terrain. Not present in original manifest — newly discovered in scan.

8 records: Genie S-65 (series rep), S-85, Z-62/40 (series rep), Z-80/60; JLG 600S (series rep), 600AJ (series rep), 860SJ; Skyjack SJ60T. Covers telescopic and articulating diesel/dual-fuel boom lifts. Not present in original manifest — newly discovered in scan.

supplementary_files.description: Top 50 equipment control layer and launch prioritization index. Tracks production_status per slot against live registries and spec injection guard. 52 entries: 32 ready, 6 staged_needs_lock, 14 missing as of 2026-03-24.

Gap-fill staging batch for Top50 machines missing or incorrectly mapped. Originally 6 records; 4 promoted (skytrak_10054, skytrak_8042, genie_gth_844, jcb_330t remapped). 2 remain in staging: cat_938 (wheel_loader, LOW conf, series_record=true) and cat_336 (excavator, LOW conf, series_record=true).
